title: Dubai's KHDA moves Indian schools to distance learning till term end amid US-Israel war on Iran
summary_full: Dubai's education regulator has extended distance learning for Indian curriculum schools until the end of the academic term. This decision, impacting CBSE and ICSE students, is a precautionary measure amid regional security concerns due to the Iran-Israel-US war. The new academic year will commence on April 6, 2026, ensuring continuity and safety for thousands of students.
